headline: Lumen Posts Wider-Than-Expected Q1 Loss, Revenues Drop Y/Y
summary: LUMN posts wider Q1 loss as revenues fall 9%, while strategic sales hit 51% and an Alkira deal targets faster-growing east-west cloud connectivity.

raw.headline: Lumen Posts Wider-Than-Expected Q1 Loss, Revenues Drop Y/Y

headline: US device promotions: the subsidy wrapper hiding the real price—service revenue
summary: In April, telcos, OEMs, and retailers rolled out 960 smartphone promos, down 28% month-over-month with trade-ins, bundles, and new line offers leading the promotional activity.

raw.headline: US device promotions: the subsidy wrapper hiding the real price—service revenue
raw.summary: In April, telcos, OEMs, and retailers rolled out 960 smartphone promos, down 28% month-over-month with trade-ins, bundles, and new line offers leading the promotional activity.

headline: Primoris Services (PRIM) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
summary: Primoris Services (PRIM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -31.99% and -10.02%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
